source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/2. 보완(준비본)/보완제출_예정)/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료 (Rev)/04 성능에 관한 자료 (Rev)/2. 사이버보안/PDF/성능시험성적서/2. [GT series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-CYN).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report A-PTR-CYN Rev. 0 for H&abyz medical image acquisition device GT series detectors GT1717C and GT1717CP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports verification of performance settings and test results for GT1717C and GT1717CP medical image acquisition device detectors.
keyPoints: The report identifies H&abyz Co., Ltd. as manufacturer and product name as 의료영상획득장치 / Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector.
The document overview states the report is for confirming performance of GT series detectors GT1717C and GT1717CP.
Testing was performed from 2026.04.06 to 2026.04.10 at H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.

All summarized test items are marked PASS, including CsI deposition thickness, sensor type, scintillator, pixel pitch, effective pixel number, MTF, DQE, sensitivity, energy range, A/D conversion, communication, and trigger mode.
The conclusion states that performance setting values for GT1717C and GT1717CP showed no abnormality.

concepts.evidence: Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다.

evidence.claim: The document is Performance Test Report A-PTR-CYN Rev. 0 issued on 2026.04.14.
evidence.evidenceText: 성능시험성적서 (Performance Test Report) Doc No. A-PTR-CYN Rev. No. 0 Issue date 2026.04.14

evidence.claim: The revision history records Rev. 0 as first establishment on 2026.04.14.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. No. Issue date Note 0 2026.04.14 First establishment

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The product name is 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The document overview states that the test report is for GT series detector performance confirmation for GT1717C and GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 GT series 디텍터(GT1717C, GT1717CP) 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: The tested item category is 의료영상획득장치.
evidence.evidenceText: (1) 품목명: 의료영상획득장치

evidence.claim: The tested serial numbers are GT1717CW2501030001 for GT1717C and GT1717CW2501030002 for GT1717CP.
The test period was 2026.04.06 to 2026.04.10.
The test place was H&abyz Co., Ltd. at 경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동.
evidence.evidenceText: (2) 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 (우) 17118)

evidence.claim: GT1717C CsI deposition thickness criterion is 300μm type: 340μm ± 10%, and GT1717CP criterion is 500μm type: 520μm ± 10%.
evidence.evidenceText: GT1717C CsI Deposition Thickness 300μm type: 340μm ± 10% ... GT1717CP 500μm type: 520μm ± 10%

evidence.claim: Sensor type criterion is a-Si TFT and the result passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type a-Si TFT 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator criterion is CsI and the result passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch criterion is 140μm ± 10% and the result passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% Panel 사양서 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number criterion is 3072 x 3072 pixels and the result passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 확인 3072 x 3072 pixels 전체영상 획득 후 유효한 영역의 픽셀 수 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area criterion is 430.08 x 430.08mm and the result passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Area 확인 430.08 x 430.08mm 전체 영상획득 후 유효한 Pixel 확인 후 Pitch Area계산 (Pixel Pitch * 유효 Pixel) PASS

evidence.claim: GT1717C MTF measured values passed at 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, and 3.0 lp/mm.
GT1717CP MTF measured values passed at 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, and 3.0 lp/mm.
GT1717C DQE measured values passed at 0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, and 3.0 lp/mm.
GT1717CP DQE measured values passed at 0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, and 3.0 lp/mm.
GT1717C sensitivity measured 148.0681 LSB/uGy against a criterion of at least 110 LSB/uGy.
evidence.evidenceText: GT1717C Center 기준 110 LSB/uGy 이상 148.0681 LSB/uGy

evidence.claim: GT1717CP sensitivity measured 159.0634 LSB/uGy against a criterion of at least 150 LSB/uGy.
evidence.evidenceText: GT1717CP Center 기준 150 LSB/uGy 이상 159.0634 LSB/uGy

evidence.claim: Limited resolution result is 3.57 lp/mm based on 1 / 140um pixel pitch * 2.
evidence.evidenceText: 결과: 1 / 140um(Pixel pitch) * 2 = 3.57 lp/mm

evidence.claim: Energy range testing confirmed normal operation at 40kvp and 150kvp.
evidence.evidenceText: 40kvp 조사 시 정상동작 정상 동작 확인 150kvp 조사 시 정상동작 정상 동작 확인

evidence.claim: A/D conversion criterion is 16bits ROIC and the result passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A/D Conversion 16bits ROIC 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Communication criterion is at least 1 Giga-bit Ethernet via PoE and the result passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1 Giga-bit Ethernet via PoE (Power over Ethernet)이상 CPU모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Trigger mode testing confirmed image acquisition for AED and Line(Manual) Trigger.
evidence.evidenceText: AED(Automatic Exposure Detection) 정상동작 영상취득 확인 Line(Manual) Trigger 정상동작 영상취득 확인

evidence.claim: The conclusion states no abnormality in performance setting values for GT1717C and GT1717CP.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: GT1717C, GT1717CP)의 성능 설정 값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

evidence.claim: The report lists KGMP 적합인정서 as an attachment.
evidence.evidenceText: [첨부 5.] KGMP 적합인정서

reviewFlags.reason: AuthorityOrJurisdiction is based on source metadata authoritySignal MFDS/domestic; the document text does not explicitly name MFDS as the issuing or reviewing authority.
No external standards such as IEC or ISO are explicitly identified in the source text.
Potential OCR or source typo in product name: 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector' appears in the text.

Potential conflicting or erroneous model evidence in section 4.1 test result: source text states 'G1717CP / 300 μm Type' and 'G1717CP / 500 μm Type' while the document overview and test table identify GT1717C and GT1717CP.
Attachment numbering is inconsistent: section 6 lists '[첨부 3.] ROIC 사양서' and '[첨부 4.] CPU 모듈 사양서', while earlier sections refer to '[첨부 4.] ROIC 사양서' and '[첨부 5.] CPU 모듈사양서'.
